label_verbatim: (Name of the Foreign Limited Liability Company in the Jurisdiction of Organization)
rationale: Header field identifying the foreign LLC by its home-jurisdiction legal name. Same key family as MLLC-12, MBCA-12, MBCA-12B (foreign-entity-name convention).

label_verbatim: FIRST: If the name of the limited liability company in its jurisdiction of organization has been changed (If no change, so indicate), the proposed name to be used in this State:
rationale: Optional Maine-side name to use after a home-name change. Reuses the same widget slot as MLLC-12 FIRST (the 'proposed name to be used in this State' line) because both forms ultimately capture 'what Maine should call this entity'. On MLLC-12 the trigger is suffix-compliance; on MLLC-12A the trigger is a home-name change — same field, broader scope. Synth may emit a literal '(no change)' string when unchanged, per the parenthetical instruction.

label_verbatim: SECOND: ...the fictitious name under which it seeks authority to conduct activities in the State of Maine is
rationale: Fictitious name for Maine use when home name is unavailable. Mirrors MLLC-12 SECOND.

label_verbatim: THIRD: The date on which the foreign limited liability company was qualified to conduct activities in the State of Maine:
rationale: Original Maine qualification date — recital, not a change field (the form asks the filer to recite when they originally qualified, for SOS to identify the existing record). Reuses CORP_MBCA-12B's entity.maine_authorization_date despite the LLC form using 'qualified' terminology vs the corp form's 'authorized' — same concept (the Maine-side authorization date).

label_verbatim: FOURTH: The nature of the business or purpose(s) to be conducted or promoted in the State of Maine is
rationale: New nature-of-business statement (a Statement of Change updates this). Reuses MLLC-12's entity.maine_business_purpose.

label_verbatim: FIFTH: The new address of the principal office, wherever located, is: (physical location - street (not P.O. Box), city, state and zip code)
rationale: New physical address of the principal office. Reuses MLLC-12's entity.principal_office.physical_address.
Optional new mailing address for the principal office.
Mapped widget (live blank).
Name of the commercial registered agent (commercial path).
Name of the noncommercial registered agent (noncommercial path).

label_verbatim: (physical location, not P.O. Box – street, city, state and zip code)
rationale: Maine physical address of the registered agent (single-line).
Optional mailing address of the registered agent.

label_verbatim: EIGHTH: The new state or other jurisdiction under whose law the foreign limited liability company is now formed
rationale: New home jurisdiction (where the LLC is now formed, after any redomestication). Reuses MLLC-12 THIRD's entity.home_jurisdiction.
Date the statement of change was signed.
Printed name of the authorized signer. Shape B (name-only — no separate title widget on the form). The adjacent (Authorized Signature**) line is wet-ink only with no AcroForm widget.
Mapped widget (live blank).
Maine SOS CRA Public Number on the Commercial Registered Agent line.
Named /Btn checkbox for the 'noncommercial' option. Mutually exclusive with the unnamed commercial checkbox.

label_verbatim: NINTH: Other changes to the statement, if any, are set forth in Exhibit ___
rationale: Catch-all exhibit letter for changes not captured by FIRST–EIGHTH. Reuses LP_MLPA-12A's filing.other_amendments_exhibit_letter (same shape; preferred over MLLC-9's amendment.* namespace because MLLC-12A is a statement-of-change rather than articles-of-amendment).

label_verbatim: Name of entity(s) on the submitted filings [1]
rationale: Cover-letter row 1 (cover-letter primitive).

widget_id: Name of entitys on the submitted filings 2
rationale: Cover-letter row 2. Field-id has typo 'entitys' (no apostrophe) preserved upstream.

label_verbatim: Hold attested copy for pick up
rationale: Expedite tier 'hold_for_pickup'.
Total fees ($90 base if changing only fields outside FIFTH per page-0 header, or $35 if changing only FIFTH; plus expedite premium).
Contact name.
Contact phone.

widget_id: Contact email address for this filing
rationale: Filing-specific contact email.

widget_id: Email address to use for annual report reminders
label_verbatim: (Email address to use for annual report reminders)
rationale: Annual-report reminder email.
Recipient name.
Recipient firm.
Recipient street.
Recipient city/state/zip combined. Field-id has double-space ('City State  Zip') preserved upstream.
